modes.purpose: Verify the unzipped package has required files, safe defaults, and no obvious local setup blockers.
Verify the work repository is initialized, has a remote, and does not track .env.local.
Verify work-local enterprise mode, .env.local presence, GitHub posture, and mock connector safety.
Verify Microsoft 365 connector values exist after approval, while keeping write scopes out unless separately approved.

requiredEvidence: private or approved work GitHub repository
.env.local present only on the work machine
CONNECTOR_MODE remains mock until Microsoft 365 approval
Microsoft Entra app registration approval before live connector use
blockedConditions: non-placeholder secret in docs or package files
connector mode set to live without tenant/client configuration
Microsoft Graph write scope present before separate write-back approval
review ZIP contains generated app data or local machine paths
